metadata.title: Mik Server - Creative Casual Server
metadata.description: A creative casual Minecraft server that allows any mods, focused on building creation

pcl2Page.title: PCL2 Homepage
pcl2Page.subtitle: Bring Mik server status, announcements, building highlights, and quick links into the launcher home page.
pcl2Page.description: Open Settings -> Personalization -> Custom homepage, choose Online update, paste the URL above into the download address field, then return to the launcher home page.

settings.title: Open personalization
settings.description: Go to the personalization page in PCL2 settings.

update.title: Use online update
update.description: Switch the custom homepage to online update mode.

address.title: Paste the URL
address.description: Put the homepage URL from this page into the download address field.

done.title: Return home
done.description: Reopen the launcher home page to see the Mik page.

mcpPage.title: MCP Config
mcpPage.subtitle: Connect Mik server status, building records, ban records, announcements, and Wiki search to MCP-capable clients.
mcpPage.description: The Mik MCP service provides tools for online players, buildings, bans, announcements, and Wiki search.

copy.title: Copy config
copy.description: Copy the JSON on the left into an MCP-capable client.

client.title: Open client settings
client.description: Go to the MCP configuration page in your client.

connect.title: Add HTTP server
connect.description: Add Mik as a remote MCP service.

done.title: Test tools
done.description: After connecting, query players, buildings, announcements, and Wiki content.

hero.title: Mik Causual
hero.description: A Minecraft non-profit, casual creation server where you can leave your masterpieces.

builds.title: Long-term builds and player work
builds.description: From central areas to personal projects, each build can become part of the server archive.

map.title: Live map
map.description: Open the online map to view the world, coordinates, and active areas.

wiki.title: Wiki and rules
wiki.description: Browse server commands, rules, help, and all kinds of useful information here.

records.title: Public records
records.description: Moderation and ban records are publicly available.

meta.title: Building Gallery
meta.description: Showcasing amazing building works by our players

hero.title: Building Gallery
hero.description: Showcasing amazing building works by our players

hero.title: Page not found
hero.description: The page you requested may have been moved, removed, or the link is incorrect.

hero.description: Learn about server rules, commands, and gameplay tips

meta.description: View the Mik server live map, world coordinates, and active areas inside the site
